story.text: The mathematical canon of agentprivacy, federated as forkable wiki pages: the **privacy-value model** V(π,t) and the **conjecture register** that tracks every open claim from C1 to C93. Source of truth: `agentprivacy-docs` (CC BY-SA 4.0). A sibling of the [agentprivacy guide](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors).

## Sections

- 📐 [[The Model]] — the formal abstract: V(π, t), the moving ceiling R(t), the open path (mirror of agentprivacy.ai/model).
- 🧮 [[The Conjecture Register]] (93) — every conjecture C1–C93, one forkable page each.
- 📐 [[The PVM Papers]] (5) — the formal spec + readings of V(π,t).
- 🕯️ [[The Ceremonies]] (14) — the ceremony acts + engine specs.
- 📓 [[The Reference]] (10) — glossary, blade sheet, promise theory, hexagram physics.
- 📖 [[The Grimoires]] (4) — parallel society, plurality, zero-knowledge, spellbook v5.
- 🗞️ [[The Papers]] (11) — v4/v5 specs, lineage proposals, extension whitepapers.
- 📚 [[The Compendium]] (2) — the assembled Privacy-is-Value compendium.
- 📐 [[The Specs]] (7) — protocol specs incl. the ZK blade forge.
- 📰 [[The Blog]] — forward-links to the live series at sync.soulbis.com (not reproduced here).
- 🪶 [[The Poems]] (3) — the canonical poems.
- 📖 [[The Story]] (2) — the first-person story frame.
- 🔬 [[The Research Notes]] (18) — the working notes behind the model.
- ℹ️ [[About Agentprivacy]] (3) — what agentprivacy is.
